prompt: Create a photorealistic candid snapshot of exactly three young adult women on a humid summer evening beside a rural Japanese railway crossing at dusk, shot with a wide-angle disposable-camera look and harsh direct flash. The scene has a slightly tilted, spontaneous composition: one woman is very close to the left edge, cropped partly out of frame, laughing toward the camera with windblown long dark hair, a fitted white graphic T-shirt, and high-waisted denim shorts; the second woman stands near the center by a striped crossing pole, smiling at the camera, wearing a low-cut pale fitted T-shirt and frayed denim shorts, holding a small patterned drawstring pouch and a colorful bottled drink; the third woman stands to the right in profile, hair in a messy bun, drinking from a plastic water bottle, wearing a semi-sheer gray graphic T-shirt and a short denim skirt, holding a pink shoulder bag and a long colorful snack or toy package. Include exactly these three visible handheld items groups: two plastic bottles, one small drawstring pouch, and one pink shoulder bag with a long package. Background details should include train tracks, overhead electrical wires, crossing signals, a black-and-yellow striped pole, roadside grass, a glowing vending machine on the far right, distant lights, and a blue-pink sunset sky. Use a quiet rural Japanese railway crossing, blue-hour summer dusk, wide-angle disposable film camera with direct flash, casual fitted T-shirts with denim shorts or skirt, and playful candid summer vacation energy. Emphasize authentic film grain, motion blur, flash glare on skin and fabric, natural imperfect poses, and a lively unposed friendship moment; avoid adding extra people, text overlays, logos, or a polished studio look.
